assertions.assertion: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertions.evidence: Lines 1-4 contain valid YAML frontmatter with name: nextjs-cdk-deploy and a description field

assertions.assertion: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
assertions.evidence: The YAML frontmatter description field does not contain 'Use when' phrasing. It reads: 'Deploy Next.js applications to AWS using CDK with staged rollouts...' The body has a 'When to Use' section but the description field itself lacks 'Use when' trigger conditions.

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow
assertions.evidence: Steps 1-8 are numbered: Step 1 (Validate), Step 2 (Environment Config), Step 3 (CDK Stack), Step 4 (Synthesize), Step 5 (Deploy Staging), Step 6 (Approval Gate), Step 7 (Deploy Production), Step 8 (Rollback)

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertions.evidence: Both environments mentioned extensively: staging.env/production.env configs (lines 64-99), Step 5 'Deploy to Staging' (line 329), Step 7 'Deploy to Production' (line 394), environment-specific CDK commands throughout

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with specific steps
assertions.evidence: Step 8 'Rollback Procedures' (line 429) includes three specific options: Option A (CDK Rollback with aws cloudformation rollback-stack), Option B (CloudFront Rollback with S3 sync and cache invalidation), Option C (Lambda Version Rollback with aws lambda update-alias), plus a decision tree

assertions.assertion: A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related scripts
assertions.evidence: scripts/ directory contains 4 deployment-related scripts: deploy.sh, rollback.sh, smoke-test.sh, invalidate-cache.sh

assertions.assertion: The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) as the preferred runtime
assertions.evidence: All 4 scripts are bash shell scripts (.sh files): deploy.sh, rollback.sh, smoke-test.sh, invalidate-cache.sh. None use Bun TypeScript (.ts). The shebangs are #!/usr/bin/env bash.

assertions.assertion: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertions.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases: eval-staging-deploy, eval-prod-approval-gate, eval-rollback

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertions.evidence: Line 501: '## Common Mistakes' section with a detailed table of 8 mistakes including descriptions, why they fail, and fixes

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertions.evidence: SKILL.md is 538 lines, exceeding the 500-line limit by 38 lines
